description: Registered passenger cars grouped by usage category with total denominator and ES|QL-computed percentages. Use when user asks private vs taxi shares or other usage categories.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL usage = KoeretoejAnvendelseStruktur.KoeretoejAnvendelseNavn.keyword | INLINESTATS total_registered_cars = COUNT(*) | WHERE usage IS NOT NULL | STATS total_registered_cars = MAX(total_registered_cars), vehicle_count = COUNT(*) BY usage | EVAL share_of_registered_cars_pct = ROUND(vehicle_count * 100.0 / total_registered_cars, 1) | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 15
